verdicts.note: Accountable operations weakly support an oversight direction, but the dossier gives no fiscal restraint mechanism.
Appointed incumbency plus school-board and firefighter service establish a strong public institutional record.
Drainage-district commission and emergency-management involvement provide a local governing record, balanced by no county-commission tenure.

review_notes: All 4 original scored pairs were reviewed exactly once (3 adjust, 1 upheld). No omitted axis had sufficiently specific dossier evidence for a supported missing proposal. Gordon E. Mitchell has no scored pairs; the withdrawn flag is consistent with the dossier’s July 18 official active-primary list check.
